name: Rivermouth District
description: A silted-up harbor quarter where the river meets the sea — transit yards, a shuttered clinic, a small-craft marina. The first ground you learn to read.
notes: M1's first region (T11), now the city's front door (T44). Baseline pinned by loadContent.test (threat 35, loot 70) — unchanged. Region adjacency wired to Downtown (the gridlock bridge) and the Ironworks (the harbor rail line).
